column1: # PRODUCTS TEMPLATE - Fill this sheet third (after suppliers and raw materials)
# Individual products will be automatically created based on Base Quantity
# 1. Product Name: Name of your finished product (REQUIRED)
# 2. Category: Choose from: plain paper print
# 6. Base Quantity: How many individual pieces you want to create (REQUIRED)
# 7. Individual Stock Tracking: Write "true" to track each piece separately
# 8. Min Stock Level: Minimum quantity before reordering
# 9. Max Stock Level: Maximum you can store
# 14. Image URL: Link to product image (optional)
# 15. Notes: Any additional information about the product
